purpose: Every `as never` in cli/src + mcp/src must be eliminated or annotated `KEEP as never` for a documented generated-type mismatch. The residual unannotated budget ratchets to 0; the two forwarding seams (result.ts, output-schema.ts) are exempt by path. Request construction uses generated request unions, typed body envelopes, and operation-specific validation. The retired request-body escape is forbidden in consumer source.

mcp: mcp/src/tools/workflows/review.ts + mcp/src/tools/workflows/resolve.ts (timeEntries.listForUser list/search/view request+response envelope does not match the wire shape)

residueNotes.removedRequestEscape: All former request-side escapes were replaced with generated flattened requests, typed body envelopes, operation-specific strict schemas, or explicit request-option query parameters. Full-replacement writes now reconstruct and validate current state before mutation.

wrapper.resolvedNote: All four strictness flags are ON for the wrapper compile (2026-06-22). The EOPT/TS4114 blockers were in the GENERATED error scaffold (src/errors/*, src/api/errors/*) + src/core/request.ts and were fixed at their source in this repo's local SDK generator scripts/generate-sdk-from-openapi.mjs (override on the cause members; explicit `| undefined` on optional scaffold props; signal `?? null`), NOT upstream in ../GOCLMCP/ (which owns only the OpenAPI spec). The former hand-written-only EOPT differential gate in check-consumer-cast-budget.mjs was retired now that `npm run type-check` enforces exactOptionalPropertyTypes + noImplicitOverride across the whole wrapper. See spec/evidence/discrepancies.md strictness.wrapper-eopt-noimplicitoverride-blocked (resolved).
